ddls:
CREATE TABLE "memory_technologies" (
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory technology */,
  "tech_name" TEXT /* Name of the memory technology (e.g., DRAM, SRAM, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the memory technology */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the memory technology */,
  "generation" TEXT /* Generation of the memory technology (e.g., DDR4, DDR5) */,
  "technology_type" TEXT /* Type of memory technology (e.g., volatile, non-volatile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the memory technology used in the configuration */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the memory configuration in bytes */,
  "associativity" INTEGER /* Associativity of the memory configuration */,
  "output_width" INTEGER /* Output width of the memory configuration in bits */,
  "operating_voltage" REAL /* Operating voltage of the memory configuration in volts */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range in which the memory configuration is operational */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Operating frequency of the memory configuration in MHz */,
  "fabrication_process" TEXT /* Fabrication process used for the memory configuration (e.g., 14nm, 7nm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES memory_technologies ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration being measured */,
  "access_time" REAL /* Access time of the configuration in nanoseconds */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption of the configuration in milliwatts */,
  "area_efficiency" REAL /* Area efficiency of the configuration in mm^2 */,
  "read_bandwidth" REAL /* Read bandwidth of the memory configuration in GB/s */,
  "write_bandwidth" REAL /* Write bandwidth of the memory configuration in GB/s */,
  "cycle_time" REAL /* Cycle time of the memory configuration in nanoseconds */,
  "data_retention" REAL /* Data retention time of the memory configuration in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail, etc.) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test performed (e.g., stress test, endurance test) */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was performed (e.g., lab, field) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, etc.) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., R&D, Quality Assurance) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the user accessed the platform */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "import_exports" (
  "import_export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import/export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the import/export */,
  "import_export_date" TEXT /* Date the import/export was performed */,
  "import_export_type" TEXT /* Type of import/export (e.g., import, export, etc.) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file imported or exported */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "import_export_status" TEXT /* Status of the import/export operation (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_import_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, test results, etc.) */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
